name: Grid Blackout
description: Neon dies citywide. Unrest cools — but nobody can find the ATM.

name: Corporate Raid
description: WUS auditors seize liquid assets. Compliance is mandatory. Fun is optional.

name: Celebrity Scandal
description: A star confesses everything on a livestream. Support swings like a broken crane.

name: Gang Revolt
description: Someone skipped pizza night. Random crews take a beating.

name: Heat Wave
description: Police flood the net. The skyline smells like badges and bad coffee.

name: Contraband Boom
description: Smugglers flood the market. Loose cash for everyone — scanners too.

name: Lab Leak
description: Stolen schematics hit the darknet. Free science, questionable ethics.

name: Media Blitz
description: Every camera is watching. Media hubs mint soft power overnight.

name: Rat King Parade
description: A cursed knot of subway rats becomes a local celebrity. Tourists tip. Clinics stay busy.

name: Influencer Meltdown
description: A streamer rage-quits mid-sponsorship. Brands dump cash; the street dumps unrest.

name: Free Pizza Friday
description: Anonymous drone drops greasy salvation. Morale up, arteries optional.

name: Crypto Rug Pull
description: The coin was called SafeMoonBeamX. It was neither safe nor a moon. Light tax.

name: UFO Over the Docks
description: Something triangulates the harbor. Researchers freak out helpfully. Heat ticks up.

name: Unionized Delivery Drones
description: The drones demand dental. Shipments slow; unrest dips while everyone argues online.

name: Haunted ATM
description: It only dispenses on blood moon Tuesdays. Today is Tuesday. Sort of.

name: Cop Karaoke Night
description: Precinct 7 streams a ballad. Heat cools from sheer secondhand embarrassment.

name: Black Market Sample Sale
description: Everything's 40% off and 90% cursed. Cash in pockets; random crews get 'tester' bruises.

name: Viral Charity Stream
description: A rival overlord's soft side trends. Support redistributes like tip jars in a hurricane.

name: Neon Fog
description: Beautiful, unbreathable. Unrest rises a notch; clinics earn their keep.

name: Audit the Auditors
description: Someone leaked the WUS expense reports. Kickbacks flow. Heat rises from the paperwork fire.

name: Street Prophet
description: A hoodie oracle predicts your next three mistakes. Support for the faithful; unrest for everyone else.

name: Glitch in Payroll
description: Double deposits, then clawbacks. Net: a little richer, a little sorer.

name: Quiet Sunday
description: Even the gunrunners sleep in. City exhales. Enjoy it.

name: Meme Plague
description: An unkillable dance challenge seizes the grid. Support goes feral. Nobody is safe.
